subcodes.first_line: O Herald of Truth! Thy letter hath been received, and from its contents it became manifest that thou art bewildered and wandering in Jásb [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی حق نامه شما رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که سرگشته و سرگردان جاسب و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @poems and quotation from poetry, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
